name: RESPECT
fullName: Long-Term Outcomes of Patent Foramen Ovale Closure or Medical Therapy after Stroke
teachingPoint: Long-term PFO closure reduces recurrent stroke vs medical therapy in selected patients <60 y.

name: CLOSE
fullName: Patent Foramen Ovale Closure or Anticoagulation vs Antiplatelets after Stroke
teachingPoint: Closure markedly cuts recurrent stroke in high-risk PFO anatomy (ASA / large shunt).

name: REDUCE
fullName: Patent Foramen Ovale Closure or Antiplatelet Therapy for Cryptogenic Stroke
teachingPoint: Closure reduces recurrent stroke and new infarcts; watch for AF and device events.
